meta.title: NAE — New AGE Energy | Heat Pumps for Latin America
meta.description: Climate technology for Latin America. Certified factory, local support, wholesale pricing.

hero.subtitle: Energy efficiency, local support, factory-direct pricing. The certainty you need to grow.

whyNae.title: Why Choose NAE?
whyNae.subtitle: The certainty you need to grow your HVAC business

factory.title: Certified Factory
factory.description: Equipment manufactured under ISO 9001 international standards, with CE certifications and rigorous quality testing.

support.title: Latin American Support
support.description: Technical support in Spanish and Portuguese, with a local team that understands your market, climate, and urgencies.

guidance.title: Complete Guidance
guidance.description: From installation to first start-up. We don't sell machines, we sell certainty. We're with you every step of the way.

pricing.title: Wholesale Pricing
pricing.description: Access to distributor pricing once your account is approved. No middlemen. No surprises.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Heat pumps for every need. From residential to commercial.

airSource.title: Air-to-Water Heat Pumps
airSource.description: Efficient solution for heating and DHW. Ideal for temperate and cold climates.

geothermal.title: Geothermal Heat Pumps
geothermal.description: Maximum efficiency using underground energy. Consumption reduction of up to 70%.

pool.title: Pool Heat Pumps
pool.description: Keep your pool at the ideal temperature all year round with maximum energy efficiency.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to grow your HVAC business?
ctaBanner.description: Register as a certified NAE installer and access wholesale pricing, priority technical support, and guidance on every project.

footer.slogan: We don't sell machines. We sell certainty.
footer.copyright: © 2026 New AGE Energy. All rights reserved.

successStories.headline: We transform installers into successful businesses
successStories.subtitle: More than equipment: we give you the tools, knowledge, and support to grow your HVAC business
successStories.ctaText: Join the installers already growing with NAE

slide1.title: Increase your income with every installation
slide1.description: Our installers report an average 300% increase in their income after getting certified with NAE. Access high-efficiency equipment, 24/7 technical support, and profit margins above 40%.

slide2.title: Continuous professional training
slide2.description: More than 500 certified installers across Latin America. Access our technical training program with specialized instructors, recognized certifications, and post-sales support that guarantees your success on every project.

slide3.title: Build your own brand in climate solutions
slide3.description: NAE supports you in creating your own heat pump installation company. We provide the equipment, training, marketing, and logistical support so you become the climate solutions leader in your region.
